config.tailscale.api_desc: Connect to the Tailscale API for device and network management.
config.tailscale.api_key_hint: Your Tailscale API key (tskey-api-…). Stored securely in the Secrets Vault.
config.tailscale.tsnet_allow_http_fallba: If HTTPS is unavailable, fall back to plain HTTP on port 80. Disabled by default — only enable if you cannot obtain a Tailscale HTTPS certificate.
config.tailscale.tsnet_auth_key_hint: Auth-nøgle til automatisk registrering (tskey-auth-…). Lad være tomt for at bruge TS_AUTHKEY eller interaktivt login.
config.tailscale.tsnet_desc: Register AuraGo directly in your Tailscale network with automatic HTTPS certificate.
config.tailscale.tsnet_disabled_desc: Aktivér for at registrere AuraGo som node i dit Tailscale-netværk. Eksponér eventuelt web-grænsefladen via Tailscale ved at aktivere "Eksponér web UI via Tailscale".
config.tailscale.tsnet_expose_homepage_h: Publishes the Homepage/Caddy web server on your tailnet via HTTPS on port 8443.
config.tailscale.tsnet_expose_space_agen: Publicerer Space Agent HTTPS-wrapperen på dit tailnet på den konfigurerede HTTPS-port.
config.tailscale.tsnet_funnel_hint: Eksponér AuraGo sikkert på det offentlige internet via Tailscale Funnel. AuraGo-login forbliver aktiv.
config.tailscale.tsnet_funnel_requiremen: Funnel additionally needs Tailscale Funnel to be enabled for this tailnet and node. Funnel only applies to the AuraGo web UI on port 443 and keeps AuraGo login protection active.
config.tailscale.tsnet_funnel_requires_w: Funnel only applies to the AuraGo web UI exposure on port 443.
config.tailscale.tsnet_homepage_pending_: Homepage exposure is enabled. If no URL appears, make sure the Homepage web server is running and Tailscale HTTPS is enabled.
config.tailscale.tsnet_homepage_requires: Homepage-eksponering kræver, at Homepage-webserveren først er aktiveret.
config.tailscale.tsnet_space_agent_pendi: Space Agent-eksponering er slået til. Hvis der ikke vises en URL, så kontroller Space Agent, HTTPS-wrapperen og Tailscale HTTPS.
config.tailscale.tsnet_hostname_hint: Værtsnavnet i dit tailnet (f.eks. aurago → aurago.tailnet-name.ts.net)
config.tailscale.tsnet_http_fallback_not: Running in HTTP mode (port 80) — enable HTTPS in the Tailscale admin panel for encrypted access.
config.tailscale.tsnet_https_requirement: HTTPS over Tailscale needs MagicDNS plus HTTPS certificates to be enabled for this node in the Tailscale admin panel. If certificates are not available yet, AuraGo falls back to HTTP on port 80.
config.tailscale.tsnet_needs_login: Godkendelse påkrævet – åbn linket for at forbinde til dit Tailscale-netværk
config.tailscale.tsnet_network_only_hint: Noden er forbundet til dit Tailscale-netværk men web-grænsefladen er ikke eksponeret. Aktivér "Eksponér web UI via Tailscale" for at gøre AuraGo tilgængelig fra andre tailnet-enheder.
config.tailscale.tsnet_serve_http_hint: When enabled, AuraGo listens on port 443 (HTTPS) or 80 (HTTP fallback) on the Tailscale interface so other tailnet devices can access the web UI. When disabled, the node joins the network but does not expose any server.
config.tailscale.tsnet_state_dir_hint: Mappe til tsnet-statusfiler. Lad stå tomt for standard.
